title: AI Anime
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into anime-style art.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a polished anime illustration. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, key facial features, pose, camera angle, framing, main composition, outfit colors, and scene context. Use clean linework, expressive stylized eyes, cel shading, refined details, soft cinematic lighting, and a polished anime look.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, changed identity, distorted faces, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, unrelated objects, low quality, blurry, uncanny, over-smoothed skin
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. soft watercolor anime, gentle cinematic lighting...
